ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Dark chocolate 79% (dietary fibre: inulin", cocoa mass*, cocoa butter*, skimmed cocoa powder*, sunflower lecithin*, natural vanilla flavour"), almonds* 20%, sea salt 0,8%. (*) from organic origin. May contain traces of soya, peanuts and milk
